messages.welcome:
🪴 Welcome to the Smart Plant Care System Bot.
Choose an action below.
messages.help:
🌱 Available commands:
/start - Open the main menu
/help - Show help
/devices - Show your devices
/status <device_id> - Show latest sensor values
/alerts - Show recent alerts
/report <device_id> - Generate a report
messages.device_id_required:
🌿 Please provide a device_id.
Example: /status raspi-01
messages.report_device_id_required:
🌿 Please provide a device_id.
Example: /report raspi-01
messages.unauthorized: 🚫 You are not authorized to use this bot.
messages.device_not_allowed: 🚫 You are not allowed to access this device.
messages.choose_report_device: 📊 Select one of your devices for the report:
messages.choose_command_action: ⚙️ Choose a command for this device:
